creator: epopen@gmail.com
text:
Hi Maintainer.

I updated to 9.16.3 via ports and tried again but got same error as below..

May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: starting BIND 9.16.3 (Stable Release) <id:5ea41c1>
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: running on FreeBSD amd64 12.1-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.1-RELEASE-p3 #9 r335865M: Thu Apr 16 13:18:03 CST 2020     root@epopen.com:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/EpopenKern
el
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: built with '--disable-linux-caps' '--localstatedir=/var' '--sysconfdir=/usr/local/etc/namedb' '--with-dlopen=yes' '--with-libxml2' '--with-openssl=/usr/local' '--with-rea
dline=-L/usr/local/lib -ledit' '--with-dlz-filesystem=yes' '--enable-dnstap' '--disable-fixed-rrset' '--disable-geoip' '--without-maxminddb' '--with-gssapi=/usr/local' 'CFLAGS=-I/usr/local/include/heimdal
 -O2 -pipe -march=core2 -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing ' 'LDFLAGS=-L/usr/local/lib/heimdal -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/heimdal:/usr/local/lib -L/us
r/local/lib -ljson-c -fstack-protector-strong ' 'LIBS=-lkrb5 -lgssapi -L/usr/local/lib' 'KRB5CONFIG=/usr/local/bin/krb5-config' '--with-libidn2=/usr/local' '--with-json-c' '--enable-largefile' '--with-lmd
b=/usr/local' '--disable-native-pkcs11' '--without-python' '--disable-querytrace' 'STD_CDEFINES=-DDIG_SIGCHASE=1' '--enable-tcp-fastopen' '--with-tuning=default' '--disable-symtable' '--prefix=/usr/local'
 '--mandir=/usr/local/man' '--infodir=/usr/local/share/info/' '--build=amd64-portbld-freebsd12.1' 'build_alias=amd64-portbld-freebsd
12.1' 'CC=cc' 'CPPFLAGS=-DLIBICONV_PLUG -isystem /usr/local/include' 'CPP=cpp' 'PKG_CONFIG=pkgconf'
......
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: parser.c:950: REQUIRE(obj != ((void *)0) && obj->type->rep == &cfg_rep_uint32) failed, back trace
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #0 0x2cfd10 in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #1 0x4b7cba in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #2 0x4aba77 in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #3 0x2e465f in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #4 0x2e041c in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #5 0x2d1551 in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #6 0x4dd56b in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: #7 0x8007fc735 in ??
May 20 11:24:15 dns named[58957]: exiting (due to assertion failure)

So I reopen the issue, sorry if mistake.
Thanks a lot.
